column1: Hey Madison, thanks for your interest in traveling with SpringBreak U by Go Blue Tours. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text shortly with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from SpringBreak U here
Loved “What's good! It's Spiffy from SpringBreak U here”
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
Hi! We're planning to travel from March 15 to the 21st for the break
cool i got you, which destination were you lookin to book?
word cancun has been super popular this year, gonna be a good time
how many ppl in your group?
dope thats solid! we all from the same school?
I'm from Florida state university and the rest are from university of Florida
nicee we got a bunch of groups from FSU this year, y'all def gonna have a good time lol
gonna put this info together for you rn, how soon were you lookin to get things booked?
That's great to hear! We wanted to book everything no later than this weekend since we noticed prices going up, if that's possible
cool if i send this through email? its a little long for text
coool whats the best email for you?
just sent lmk if you got it
hooked it up with our new year deal to for y'all
Perfect I just got it thanks sm!
Of course, I just forwarded everyone else the email so I'm just waiting on their responses and then I'll get back to you Thanks again for all the help
sounds goooood, lmk if anyone has any questions
Liked “sounds goooood, lmk if anyone has any questions”
Hi sorry for the late response Is the $684 per person And is that number per night or for the 5 days?
Okay perfect and that's per person correct?
Also it's confirmed 4 of us total
okay cool lets do it. we ready to get things secured tonight?
Would it be possible to get things secured tomorrow afternoon?
yea tomorrow is cool for sure. ill send it over in the am
Great! Thank you so much we really appreciate it
ofc. we know what days we wanna do? 14-19th?
Is it possible to do the 15th-21st, if not then the 14th-19th works too
15th to 21st would be 6 nights, we wanted 5 nights right?
We didn't see an option for 6 that's why we were curious bc that was the original plan However Would you recommend 5 night? It's our first trip like this so we weren't sure how long it should be
5 nights is the sweet spot. we can def do 6 nights its just a little more expensive
Okay so then we'll stick to the five nights Could we do the 15th to the 20th?
yea! will send in the am
hey morning just sent that reservation over!
Hey perfect! I'm forward it to my group know
sounds good if you need any help getting on just lmk
Perfect, how much would the travel insurance be?

yea so since its handled directly through our third party insurance provider Travel Insured, I dont have a direct way to tell how much your policy will be. they determine it case by case based on your package size, how much coverage you want, travel dates, the state you reside in, and other nuances I dont know much about lol
but Ive seen it range from low end 30 to high end 100 give or take
Okay great! I'll let them know Also if we wanted to add an additional person would that increase the room fees or decrease it? Apologies for the constant changes
yea so if we went 5 people, it would be a room of 3 and a room of 2. that would change occupancy pricing for each person. itll be just a little more expensive
Okay so we'll just stick with the 4 then Also I'm gathering all of them up now so we can close this up already I'll get back to you no later than an hour or so :)
3/4 of us can close out and pay the deposit now The last friend is at work and she doesn't get out until 4/5 pm (would she be able to send her deposit money then?)
okay cool. yea she can hop in when she get out of work. I'll keep her slot ready
Okay so I'm know being informed that they want to wait until our friend gets out of work, is that okay? My sincerest apologies, this is why I'm one planning everything haha
Yea let me just put that note in
Loved “Yea let me just put that note in”
Hi! I heard you spoke to my other friend who was a little behind haha 3/4 of us are now officially ready to pay the deposit
yea she hmu! okay cool. do you have the link and stuff
aight dope dope lmk if y'all need any help getting settled
Okay will do! Thanks again for all ur help 🙏
hi so I don't have my passport number since my passport doesn't come in for another week Do I just skip that part for now on the information area?
you can skip that for now yup
Hi I just want to make sure you can see the payments on your side?
And just to confirm the $200 is due today and everything is due at the later date in the email?
Yea I see your payment on this end. and yup the balance isnt due til the 9th
Okay great and do you see the other two payments as well?
I see Dalila is paid! Nicole I see her name but no payment
yoo! did y'all want to add any party pass tickets to your packages?
Hey! Let me check with the group now and I'll let you know!
How much are the part pass tickets?
Also are these parties on the resort or elsewhere?
yea party pass is dope comes with express entry, cover charge, and open bar at our off resort hosted nightclub events
venues like D'Cave, Coco Bongo, HOF, Vaquita, Mandala, Mandala Beach, and more
3-Night Party Package: $210 per person 4-Night Party Package: $269 per person 5-Night Party Package: $299 per person
Okay perff, I'm sending this all to my group now to see what they decide! Thank you so much
hey hey, safe travels today lmk if y'all need anything
Thanks sm you have been absolutely amazing!!
Also how does the pick up work?
They have your flight times and are tracking your arrival. When you land just head out towards the exit area and look for Go Blue Tours staff in blue t shirts
We ended up getting the party package
